title: ToolTreaux Clear Craft Cutting Mat Art Supplies Hobby Tools (3 Sizes)
description:
This clear cutting mat from ToolTreaux provides a great work area, reliable cutting base and excellent work surface protection, whether for kids art projects, photography, drafting, architecture, sewing, scrapbooking and more. Measuring 12 x 18 inches, the cutting board provides a large work area and screened inch, metric and angled trimming guides (including 60 and 45 degree lines), that makes for accurate measuring, trimming, drawing and cutting. And, made from layers of heavy duty and durable vinyl plastic, the craft mat measures 1/8 inches in thickness and will stand up to lots of wear and tear! The cutting mat provides excellent protection against blades, glue, pens, Sharpies and other craft or art supplies that might otherwise ruin the finish of a desk or tabletop
